title.value: CH VACD Target disease and illnesses undergone for immunization

description.value: This valueset contains all entries defining target deseases or illnesses undergone for immunization reasons.

display.value: Encephalitis caused by tick-borne encephalitis virus (disorder)
Disease caused by Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)
Influenza caused by pandemic influenza virus (disorder)
Influenza caused by seasonal influenza virus (disorder)

Influenza caused by Influenza A virus subtype H3N2 (disorder)
Influenza caused by Influenza A virus subtype H5N1 (disorder)
Influenza caused by Influenza B virus (disorder)
